name: Lips Diy Master
author: Poki
description: Lips DIY Master is a fashion game where you create the perfect look starting from the lips! Care for your lips, choose stunning colors, and decorate them with fun patterns and stickers to set the vibe of your entire style. Then move on to full-face makeup with brows and eyeshadow, and finish it all with matching outfits and accessories. Ready to design the ultimate glam look? How to play Lips Diy Master? Click or tap to make the choice. Who created Lips Diy Master? Lips Diy Master is created by WeLoPlay. How can I play Lips Diy Master for free? You can play Lips Diy Master for free on Poki. Can I play Lips Diy Master on mobile devices and desktop? Lips Diy Master can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
